'''âg-j-k''' ('''kagajak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:prealign|prealign]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-j-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:prealign|prealign]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-j-k
|-
! Lemma
| kagajak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigajak|thigajak]] || [[word:jigajak|jigajak]] || [[word:shigajak|shigajak]] || [[word:kigajak|kigajak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugajak|thuthugajak]] || [[word:jujugajak|jujugajak]] || [[word:shushugajak|shushugajak]] || [[word:kukugajak|kukugajak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugajak|thugajak]] || [[word:jugajak|jugajak]] || [[word:shugajak|shugajak]] || [[word:kugajak|kugajak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugajak|thugajak]] || [[word:jugajak|jugajak]] || [[word:shugajak|shugajak]] || [[word:kugajak|kugajak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegajak|thegajak]] || [[word:jegajak|jegajak]] || [[word:shegajak|shegajak]] || [[word:kegajak|kegajak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogajak|thothogajak]] || [[word:jojogajak|jojogajak]] || [[word:shoshogajak|shoshogajak]] || [[word:kokogajak|kokogajak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogajak|thogajak]] || [[word:jogajak|jogajak]] || [[word:shogajak|shogajak]] || [[word:kogajak|kogajak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogajak|thogajak]] || [[word:jogajak|jogajak]] || [[word:shogajak|shogajak]] || [[word:kogajak|kogajak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgajak|thĂŠgajak]] || [[word:jĂŠgajak|jĂŠgajak]] || [[word:shĂŠgajak|shĂŠgajak]] || [[word:kĂŠgajak|kĂŠgajak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagajak|thathagajak]] || [[word:jajagajak|jajagajak]] || [[word:shashagajak|shashagajak]] || [[word:kakagajak|kakagajak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagajak|thagajak]] || [[word:jagajak|jagajak]] || [[word:shagajak|shagajak]] || [[word:kagajak|kagajak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagajak|thagajak]] || [[word:jagajak|jagajak]] || [[word:shagajak|shagajak]] || [[word:kagajak|kagajak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagajak|shagajak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagajak|goshagajak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagajak|gokishagajak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagajaknĂŒ|shagajaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagajaknknĂŒ|goshagajaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagajaknĂŒ|gokishagajaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagajakshĂ«|shagajakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagajaknkshĂ«|goshagajaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagajakshĂ«|gokishagajakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagajakro|shagajakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagajaknkro|goshagajaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagajakro|gokishagajakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagajakmu|shagajakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagajaknkmu|goshagajaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagajakmu|gokishagajakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagajaksher|shagajaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagajaknksher|goshagajaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagajaksher|gokishagajaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagajakng|shagajakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagajaknkng|goshagajaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagajakng|gokishagajakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagajakya|shagajakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagajaknkya|goshagajaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagajakya|gokishagajakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagajakyam|shagajakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagajaknkyam|goshagajaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagajakyam|gokishagajakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagajaknĂŒshĂ«|shagajaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagajaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshagajaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagajaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishagajaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagajaknĂŒro|shagajaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagajaknknĂŒro|goshagajaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagajaknĂŒro|gokishagajaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagajaknĂŒmu|shagajaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagajaknknĂŒmu|goshagajaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagajaknĂŒmu|gokishagajaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagajakshĂ«nĂŒ|shagajakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagajaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagajaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagajakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagajakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagajakshĂ«ro|shagajakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagajaknkshĂ«ro|goshagajaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagajakshĂ«ro|gokishagajakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagajakshĂ«mu|shagajakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagajaknkshĂ«mu|goshagajaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagajakshĂ«mu|gokishagajakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagajakronĂŒ|shagajakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagajaknkronĂŒ|goshagajaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagajakronĂŒ|gokishagajakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagajakroshĂ«|shagajakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagajaknkroshĂ«|goshagajaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagajakroshĂ«|gokishagajakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagajakromu|shagajakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagajaknkromu|goshagajaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagajakromu|gokishagajakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagajakmunĂŒ|shagajakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagajaknkmunĂŒ|goshagajaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagajakmunĂŒ|gokishagajakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagajakmushĂ«|shagajakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagajaknkmushĂ«|goshagajaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagajakmushĂ«|gokishagajakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagajakmuro|shagajakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagajaknkmuro|goshagajaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagajakmuro|gokishagajakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
